descriptions.sector-weightings: Analyse portfolio sector exposure from individual stocks and ETFs.
descriptions.geographic-allocation: Analyse portfolio geographic exposure by exchange and region for diversification insights.
descriptions.weekend-weekday-spending: Analyse your spending patterns based on day of week to understand habits.
descriptions.uncategorized-transactions: Find and categorise transactions that are missing categories.
descriptions.dividend-income: Track capital gains and losses (realised + unrealised) alongside dividend and interest income.
descriptions.realized-gains: Track realised gains and losses from sold securities for tax planning and performance review.

uncategorizedTransactions.allCategorized: All transactions are categorised. Great job!

customPages.createSubtitle: Define how you want to view and analyse your financial data

creditUtilization.empty: No credit card or line of credit accounts with a credit limit found. Add a credit card or line of credit with a credit limit to see utilisation.
